== Notes for [[Item:Q80316|Q80316]] ==

ID: I86644

Name: Claudia Appelinius

Given Name: Claudia

Surname: Appelinius

Sex: F

_UID: 3C76DF5E95FF754DBC7399E92081C20E6797

Change Date: 18 Oct 2005

Birth: ABT 200

Death: deceased

Father: Claudius Appelinius b: ABT 160

Mother: Basina Severus b: 183

Marriage 1 Flavius Numerius

Married:

Children

Flavius Crispus b: ABT 230

Claudius II Gothicus b: 10 MAY 214

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I86644

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
